name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Category
title: R5: A grouping for ordinal or polychotomous variables (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.category` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.category` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.category` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `EvidenceVariable.category` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.category` has a context of EvidenceVariable based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.category` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
